methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series C → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.7x) to $1.5B last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same-stage peers in Biotech & Health. Range: $810M - $4.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 6.1x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health

private.name: Ultima Genomics
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series C), post-money $4B

private.name: Insitro
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series C), post-money $2.4B

private.name: New Limit
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series C), post-money $810M

data.narrative:
Colossal Biosciences, a Series C biotech company founded by Ben Lamm and George Church, is valued at $1.5B post-money following $555M+ in total capital raised. The valuation analysis draws on a peer universe of 3 public comparables (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L) and 8 private peers in Biotech & Health, including Ultima Genomics ($4.0B), Insitro ($2.4B), and New Limit ($810M).

Two triangulation methods proved applicable. Stage-progression analysis applied a 1.7x step-up multiplier to the $1.5B Series C post-money valuation, implying $2.5B. Peer-median valuation across the 3 same-stage, same-sector private comparables yielded $2.4B, with the peer range spanning $810M to $4.0B. Public-comp anchoring using the Biotech & Health sector P/S median of 6.1x could not be applied due to absence of target revenue disclosure, typical for private companies.

The two-method triangulation supports a valuation range of $2.0B (low) to $2.9B (high), with a median of $2.5B. This implies upside from the current $1.5B valuation of approximately 33–93%, depending on execution against pipeline and capital efficiency. Key uncertainties center on revenue trajectory, regulatory pathway clarity for core programs, and capital requirements to Series D.
